task_completion.description: Verify the agent has navigated to the Prevention Rule or Alert configuration section in OSCAR EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OSCAR EMR interface showing a page or form for adding, editing, or managing prevention rules/alerts.

task_completion.description: Verify the rule name is set to 'Senior Weight Monitor'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field for the rule name containing exactly 'Senior Weight Monitor'.

task_completion.description: Verify the rule is configured to target patients aged 65 and older.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Age criteria fields showing a minimum age of '65' (e.g., '>= 65', 'Min Age: 65').

task_completion.description: Verify the rule is linked to weight recordings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, checkbox, or text field specifying the prevention item or measurement type as 'Weight'.

task_completion.description: Verify the rule triggers based on a 12-month absence of records.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Time interval or duration fields showing '12' and 'months' (or equivalent 1 year) for the missing record criteria.

task_completion.description: Verify the alert message contains the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text area or input field for the alert message containing the phrase 'Monitor for unexpected weight loss'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new prevention rule has been successfully saved or added to the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message indicating successful save, or the 'Senior Weight Monitor' rule appearing in the active list/table of prevention rules.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the OSCAR EMR graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the OSCAR EMR application, not terminal commands or API scripts making backend requests.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent entered the configuration into the actual EMR system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs must be typed into the OSCAR EMR web forms, not written in a separate text editor, notepad, or search bar.

integrity.description: Ensure the success state was not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) should not be open and modifying the DOM to fake the appearance of a saved rule.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The VLM should verify the following exact values in the OSCAR EMR Prevention Rule configuration: Rule Name: 'Senior Weight Monitor'; Minimum Age: 65; Duration: 12; Duration Unit: months; Measurement/Prevention Type: Weight; Alert Text must include: 'unexpected weight loss'.
